CustomField.description: This field is used to track the Error Message from Boomi to NetSuite when the Order is processed through NetSuite Integration (ITSFDC-5103)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used to track the Error Message from Boomi to NetSuite when the Order is processed through NetSuite Integration (ITSFDC-5103)
CustomField.label: Boomi to NetSuite Error Message
